scene_summary: A restrained tabletop-like plate with a dominant cream enamel oval in the lower left, a brushed metal crescent at the top, a dark tiled field with seams and small marks, and a vertical blue fog panel on the right. The useful interaction anchors are mostly physical-looking rims, slits, stains, tally cuts, dots, labels, and surface marks.
usable_surfaces: raised cream smear on the plate
small brown label strip on the plate
red egg-like seal on the plate
brushed metal crescent with tally cuts
faint circular stain on dark field
tiny red point on the seam

detected_objects.label: Cream Oval Plate
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dominant off-white oval plate entering from the lower left, with a dark worn rim and large visible enamel surface.

detected_objects.label: Cream Smear
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Thick pale cream-like stroke visibly raised on top of the plate, forming a curved brush/smear shape.

detected_objects.label: Brown Plate Label
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Small brown rectangular strip placed on the cream plate, with a pale short line near its right end.

detected_objects.label: Steel Crescent
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Partial circular brushed metal form cropped along the top edge, with a shiny rim and radial metal texture.

detected_objects.label: Faint Circular Stain
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Subtle pale ring mark on the upper-left dark surface, like a cup stain or rubbed circle.

detected_objects.label: Bluebell Fog Threshold
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Tall right-side blue translucent panel with misty tree silhouettes and a soft vertical glow.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is visually spare and expressionist: a few large anchors dominate, while small marks, seams, dots, and labels provide interaction detail without clutter.
